delegation: User granted blanket Tier-3 delegation on 2026-07-11 ('Just fix all the issues to the highest order, whatever you think is right'). All subsequent resolutions applied under that authority on the bundled mock pack; each is ledger-logged and flagged where a value is an assistant-supplied demo placeholder that a real submission would source from records.

period.source: GET /defaults; 12 contiguous months in sales and complaints

device.cadence: annual (Class IIb — EU MDR Art. 86(1); UK MDR 44ZM(6))

inputs.device_context: green — five confirmations resolved (ledger 8, 19); D1/D2/D3/D5/D6 prose routed into market_history and other_associated_documents (§6)
inputs.sales: green — Region Gate passed; 84 rows, 13,505 units preserved exactly (EEA+TR+XI 5,945 incl. NI 43; UK/GB 1,425; US 6,135); 12 contiguous months
inputs.complaints: green — Region Gate passed; 32 rows (17 serious), all countries in classifier table; 30/32 pre-coded, remaining 2 left to imdrf_coder.py by design; 12 months covered
inputs.capa: green — 5 rows; D9 scope confirmed from file contents (ledger 18)
inputs.fsca: green — regions_affected expanded to country lists on all 3 rows
inputs.pms_plan: green — period matches, activities with frequencies
inputs.previous_psur: green — D7 deviation documented with comparability statement in benefit_risk_evaluation.comments (ledger 13, 14); structured summary counts preserved
inputs.external_events: green — 10 rows incl. similar/competitor devices for Section K (ledger 4)

deterministic_log.columns: all 6 CSVs match locked API column sets exactly; all JSON key trees match locked templates (previous_psur.summary dict shape preserved)
deterministic_log.totals_preserved: sales 13,505 units before and after region disaggregation (asserted in transform script)

declarations.D1: CLOSED — Class IIb Rule 10 (EU MDR 2017/745 + UK MDR), MDR-certified by BSI NL (2797), not implantable, not custom-made, not legacy, regimes EU+GB, first CE 2015. Routed to market_history.
declarations.D2: CLOSED — units_sold = finished devices distributed to customers/distributors per calendar month; single consistent denominator. Routed to market_history.
declarations.D3: CLOSED — exposure approximated by units distributed (13,505 WW / 5,945 EEA+TR+XI / 1,425 GB); units are an upper bound on patients (multiple devices per procedure possible). Routed to market_history.
declarations.D4: D10 OMISSION — four-year cumulative history not available in this dataset; Table 6 limited to current + previous period (ledger 17).
declarations.D5: CLOSED — X100 + X100 Reload grouped under Basic UDI-DI TD1001; leading device X100 (Class IIb); same NB BSI (2797); no additions/removals in period. Routed to other_associated_documents.
declarations.D6: CLOSED (DEMO PLACEHOLDERS, ledger 16) — PSUR-LSX100-2023-002 v1.0; MedCorp Surgical B.V., Amsterdam (SRN NL-MF-000012345); EU AR not applicable (EU manufacturer); UKRP MedCorp UK Ltd; AB BSI Assurance UK Ltd (0086), UKCA-2021-45678. Routed to other_associated_documents.
declarations.D7: CLOSED — documented deviation: PSUR cycle re-aligned to calendar year; 3-month overlap with PSUR001 disclosed with comparability statement (ledger 13).
declarations.D8: CLOSED — FSCA01 completed/effective; CAPA01 completed/effective, carried forward; open signal (US misfire cluster) under continued surveillance; no NB actions outstanding. Routed to benefit_risk_evaluation.comments.
declarations.D9: CLOSED — 5 CAPAs all safety/performance/quality-scoped (triggers: complaint x2, trend x1, audit x2); prior-cycle CAPA01 included; CAPA04/CAPA05 open (Pending effectiveness) and included; no voluntary marketing suspensions (ledger 18).
D10: D4 four-year history: 'Four-year cumulative complaint history is not available in this dataset; the demo data begins 2023-01-01 and prior-period data is consolidated in PSUR001. Table 6 therefore presents the current and previous reporting periods only.' (assistant-drafted under user delegation of 2026-07-11)
NI complaint attribution: NI accounts for ~3% of UK volume; 3% of the 6 UK complaints rounds to zero, so no complaint rows were re-attributed to Northern Ireland.

run.note: POST /runs accepted (201 — locked-structure validation passed). Pipeline completed discovery (12 files), device context, denominator/cadence decisions, parsing, and deterministic IMDRF coding, then failed at the first LLM call: no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY. Add a key to psur-generator/.env and resubmit: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/runs -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"period":{"start":"2023-01-01","end":"2023-12-31"}}'

notes: intake_declarations.md generated at repo root alongside this file. All region values now resolve in classify_country_to_psur_region()'s table; sales totals asserted preserved (13,505 units).
